prestazioni: SR20DET (black top, 7,000 rpm redline) with Tomei 260° cams (264° intake/260° exhaust, 11.5mm lift) and Tomei Type-S valve springs to handle 9,000 rpm safely, paired with a Garrett GTX3076R Gen II turbo (0.82 A/R, 62 trim compressor, 76 trim turbine) on a custom 3-inch stainless steel turbo manifold by Tomei with 304-grade stainless steel wastegate flanges

N1-spec oil pump, Tomei high-volume fuel pump (255 lph), and HKS 2640 fuel injectors (850cc/min) fed by a Tomei 80mm titanium intake plenum with a HKS Super Power Flow Type-R air filter, mated to a custom 3-inch aluminum intercooler piping kit by GReddy with silicone couplers and T-bolt clamps for 1.2 bar boost

OS Giken 1.5-way mechanical LSD with 4.375 final drive ratio, Nismo 5-speed close-ratio gearbox (2.916 1st, 1.904 2nd, 1.370 3rd, 1.041 4th, 0.820 5th), and a Nismo 2-way clutch-type limited-slip differential with 40% lock under power and 60% under deceleration, paired with a Nismo 750kg lightweight flywheel and ACT 6-puck unsprung ceramic clutch
estetica: Vertex Lang II widebody kit (Kouki-specific, 30mm front/40mm rear fender flares) with custom carbon fiber overfenders by Seibon, paired with a Rocket Bunny V3 rear bumper (Kouki-specific, with integrated diffuser and dual 3.5-inch exhaust exits) and a custom front lip by C-West (Kouki-specific, 3-piece carbon fiber with integrated canards)

Work Meister S1 3P 17x9 +22 front and 17x10 +30 rear wheels (8.5J ET22 front, 9.5J ET30 rear) with 225/45/17 front and 255/40/17 rear Yokohama Advan A052 tires, paired with BC Racing BR coilovers (Kouki-specific, 8kg front/10kg rear springs, 30-way adjustable damping) and Cusco front strut bar (22mm hollow steel, Kouki-specific mounting points)

Full custom interior by Bride with Zeta IV carbon fiber bucket seats (Kouki-specific, 12-way adjustable, 1.2kg each), a Nismo 350mm steering wheel (suede, 1.8kg) with a Works Bell quick-release hub, and a custom roll cage by AutoPower (8-point, 4130 chromoly, Kouki-specific gussets for chassis reinforcement)
